component.name: link
component.description: Inline navigation element. Renders as an <a> anchor. Supports Primary, Neutral, and On-color styles, Small and Medium sizes, and an Inline mode with persistent underline.

source.note: Manifest filename contains a typo ('mainifest'). Preserved as-is.

rtl.reason: Text-only links produce no CSS layout delta between LTR and RTL. Directionality is handled by the document or element dir attribute. RTL will become relevant when icon slots are added.

small.note: Small is the default size. No modifier class required.

neutral.visited_note: Neutral Visited intentionally reuses --Link-link-primary-visited. No separate --Link-link-neutral-visited token exists in Figma.

false.text-decoration: none by default; underline on hover and active

root.description: Anchor element. Must include href for keyboard operability.

text.description: Direct text content or a <span> wrapper. No dedicated class required for text-only links.

variants.notes: 144 = 6 states × 2 RTL × 3 styles × 2 sizes × 2 inline. RTL discarded. Inline is a boolean modifier, not a dimension. Meaningful: 6 states × 3 styles × 2 sizes = 36.

implementation_notes: Focus ring implemented via CSS outline (not border) to avoid layout shift. 2px solid, outline-offset 2px.
Neutral Visited uses --Link-link-primary-visited token. Intentional per Figma.
Disabled state: <a> cannot use disabled attribute. Use aria-disabled='true' + tabindex='-1'.
pointer-events: none on disabled does not prevent keyboard activation — JavaScript click guard is required at implementation level.
gap token preserved for future icon slot support even though no icon children exist in current manifest.
Default size is Small. No modifier class required for Small.
